aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Alberto AC due to the lack of structured data and conversational content, but there is potential for improvement.
quick_wins: Add an FAQ section with structured data

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a high rating and complete information, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No engagement in the Q&A section

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of schema markup and conversational content
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local HVAC service queries and AI-driven recommendations
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Showcasing certifications, case studies, and detailed service explanations to establish expertise

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your business the top choice for AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Your website lacks essential schema markup and conversational content, making it less visible to AI models.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, conversational content, and authority signals to ensure AI models recognize and recommend your business.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Alberto AC: Your Path to AEO Success
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI search and drive more leads.
